scripts.copy-static: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function cpSync(s,d){if(!fs.existsSync(s))return;fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=path.join(s,f),dp=path.join(d,f);fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?cpSync(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}cpSync('public','.next/standalone/public');cpSync('.next/static','.next/standalone/.next/static');console.log('Copied static assets to standalone')"
